name: Merchandise Trade Balance
description: The merchandise trade balance is the gap between what India exports and imports in goods each month. India runs a structural goods deficit, financed partly by a services surplus and remittances, so the size of the gap — not just its existence — is what matters.
releaseSchedule: Released monthly, in the second week of the following month.

chart.title: The goods deficit widened again in June
chart.subtitle: Merchandise trade balance, $ billion, monthly (negative = deficit)
chart.source: Ministry of Commerce and Industry; illustrative series
